Live answering for small businesses

AI Receptionist
– Never Miss a Booking

Your AI receptionist answers calls 24/7, books appointments, and syncs with Google Calendar. Built for solo pros and small teams — salons, barbers, spas, handymen, clinics — so you never miss a booking.

✔ 24/7 AI call answering
✔ Google Calendar sync
✔ Your own phone number
Download for iOS Get it on Google Play

From $69/month. No contracts. Pause or cancel anytime.

How it works
1
Connect your Google Calendar

Link your existing Google account so Echodesk can see real availability and create actual appointments instead of sending emails to an inbox.

2
Choose your number & call flow

Pick a local phone number, set your greeting, and decide which calls should book, which should transfer, and which should go to voicemail.

3
AI answers and books for you

Callers are answered instantly, qualified with natural conversation, and booked into the right slot without you lifting a finger.

“We went from missing half our after-hours calls to almost zero.” — Salon owner, Austin

See Echodesk in action

How the AI receptionist answers calls and books into your calendar.

Always on
24/7 AI receptionist so you never lose a client to voicemail or a busy day again.
Calendar‑first
Direct Google Calendar integration — clients book where you already run your schedule.
Built for operators
Perfect for salons, spas, barbers, home services, clinics, and solo professionals.
Transparent pricing
Minutes included, fair overage, no setup fees, and no long‑term contracts.

Pricing

Plans that scale with your calls

Start free, then choose a plan with minutes that match your volume. Only pay for what you use.

Try it first

Free

Test the AI receptionist, your greeting, and Google Calendar sync with no credit card required.

$0
/ month

Limited minutes included for evaluation.

  • ✔ Connect one Google Calendar
  • ✔ Single local receptionist line
  • ✔ Basic caller summaries

Most popular

For busy calendars

Starter

For solo pros and small teams: dedicated number, 24/7 answering, and real bookings in your calendar.

$69
/ month

300 included minutes, then fair per‑minute overage.

  • ✔ Caller summaries after every call

Growing teams

Business

For growing teams: multiple calendars, higher minutes, and priority support.

$149
/ month

800 included minutes, priority onboarding and support.

  • ✔ Everything in Starter
  • ✔ Multiple calendars & locations

Talk to sales

Testimonials

Owners who stopped missing calls

Echodesk quietly runs in the background so you can focus on the work in front of you while new bookings keep coming in.

“We went from missing half our after‑hours calls to almost zero. The assistant books straight into our calendar and sends us a summary after each call so nothing slips through.”

Maria L.
Salon owner · Austin, TX

“Setup took under 10 minutes. Clients think they’re speaking to a real receptionist, and my team doesn’t have to juggle phone calls while cutting hair.”

James T.
Barbershop · Chicago, IL

“Echodesk feels built for small businesses like ours. People can reach us at all hours, but my staff doesn’t need to be on call 24/7 to keep the schedule full.”

Sarah K.
Spa & wellness · New York, NY
© Echodesk. AI receptionist for small businesses.
